Class ClanPermissionMenu

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.gui.ClanPermissionMenu
public final class ClanPermissionMenu extends Object
Chest GUI for viewing and editing a single clan member's permissions.

Each capability occupies one slot: left-click toggles the capability, right-click toggles its GRANT_* counterpart (leader only). The GUI is a render snapshot read from ClanCache; every toggle is routed through ClanService, which is the authority gate, and the menu rebuilds from the freshly cached snapshot on success.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClanPermissionMenu

      public ClanPermissionMenu(ClanService clanService, ClanCache clanCache, org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)

  • Method Details

    • open

      public void open(org.bukkit.entity.Player viewer, UUID targetId)
      Opens (or rebuilds) the permission GUI for viewer targeting targetId. Validates the target is still a non-leader member of the viewer's clan; otherwise closes any open inventory and messages the viewer. Must run on the main thread.
      Parameters:
      viewer - the player to show the GUI to
      targetId - the member whose permissions are shown

    • toggle

      public void toggle(org.bukkit.entity.Player viewer, ClanPermissionHolder holder, ClanPermission permission)
      Toggles permission on the target, choosing grant or revoke from the current snapshot, then rebuilds the GUI on success. Silently ignores clicks the viewer is not authorised for (the lore already marks them locked); the service remains the final gate.
      Parameters:
      viewer - the player who clicked
      holder - the open GUI's holder
      permission - the permission to toggle (a base capability or its GRANT_* counterpart)
